textSpans.text: Perform at: Southern Hills Hospital & Medical Center
left reverse total shoulder on April 7th at Southern Hills Hospital.
Bhatia, Sonu MD - Primary Care Provider (PCP)
I saw the patient with Rhianna McGowan, elicited a history, performed an exam, and developed an impression and
Diagnosis: Shoulder Arthritis, Left - M19.012, M75.22, M24.012
diagnoses: Bicipital Tendinitis and Loose Body, Shoulder
His pain is a 3 out of 10.
Sig: Take 1 tablet orally every 6 hours as needed for pain.
He was provided with post operative pain medication and a sling.
Initiate Treatment: Initiate treatment with prescription medication.
Quantity: 28 Tablet Earliest fill date: March 28, 2026
Plan: Additional Notes, Counseling - Preoperative Instructions, Prescription Medication Management, Opioid Risk Tool,
Based on Risk Selected: Low Risk (0-3 points)
Plan: Opioid Risk Tool. Opioid Risk Tool (ORT) Score: Based on Risk Selected: Low Risk (0-3 points)

textSpans.text: Physical Therapy Occupational Therapy Physical Therapy
5670 W Flamingo Rd, Ste D, Las Vegas NV 89103
Primary Needs for Home Health (check all that apply):
When we call, we will also need to obtain the following information before seeing the
If you have these available, feel free to fax along with this form.
Recent H&P or recent progress notes
Procedure Description: left total shoulder arthroplasty
23430: tenodesis of long tendon of biceps
23472: arthroplasty, glenohumeral joint; total shoulder (glenoid and proximal humeral replacement (eg, total shoulder))
23333: removal of foreign body, shoulder; deep (subfascial or intramuscular)
HPI: This is an 81 year old male who:
is being seen for a chief complaint of left shoulder.
Anthony presents today for left shoulder
He is scheduled for a left reverse total shoulder arthroplasty on 04/07/26 at Southern Hills
Left upper extremity exam notable for the
Active forward flexion to 135 degrees. 4 out
Hawkins, Neer, and empty can test.
Patient Specific Notes: Anthony presents today for preoperative visit.
Aspirin therapy was discussed, he has this at home.
He will follow up 2 weeks after
Please refer to the education handout for detailed counseling.
Follow up for: Further Evaluation and Management - 5 minutes.
I was present for all key aspects of the visit.
Physical Therapy Occupational Therapy Physical Therapy
Electronically Signed By: Lawrence R Huff, MD, 03/28/2026 05:50 PM PDT
Electronically Signed By: Rhianna I McGowan, PA-C, 03/28/2026 09:12 AM PDT
